NOTES   (see introductory pages for explanation of train operator codes and standard symbols)
a
Arrival time
d
Departure time
s
Stops to set down only
u
Stops to pick up only
c
Arrives 10 minutes earlier
e
Arrives 14 minutes earlier
f
Arrives 3 minutes earlier
g
Arrives 4 minutes earlier
FO
Fridays only
MFX
Not Mondays and Fridays
MO
Mondays only
WO
Wednesdays only
WX
Not Wednesdays

NOTES   (see introductory pages for explanation of train operator codes and standard symbols)
a
Arrival time
d
Departure time
s
Stops to set down only
u
Stops to pick up only
c
Arrives 5 minutes earlier
FO
Fridays only
FX
Not Fridays

NOTES   (see introductory pages for explanation of train operator codes and standard symbols)
a
Arrival time
d
Departure time
s
Stops to set down only
u
Stops to pick up only
